top.title: Comey charged with threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
top.summary: The new case stems from a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director that the justice department says calls for violence against Trump.

top.title: United Arab Emirates to quit oil cartel Opec
top.summary: The UAE's decision, after nearly 60 years of membership, is seen as a potential death knell for the oil cartel.

top.title: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
top.summary: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.

top.title: Why Sam Altman and his former hero Elon Musk are taking their toxic feud to court
top.summary: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.

top.title: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says
top.summary: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
